Briefly

Today's news. In your own words.

01

Soviet Submarine Wreck Near Norway Still Contaminated

  • 37년 전 침몰한 소련 잠수함 K-278이 여전히 높은 방사선 수치를 보이고 있어요.
  • 그 지역은 세계에서 가장 물고기가 많은 지역 중 하나입니다.
  • 과학자들은 위험이 없다고 말하지만 여전히 주의를 기울이고 있습니다.
K-278Norwayradiationsubmarine

Say it in your own words

  1. 1

    A long time ago, a Soviet submarine sank.

  2. 2

    Now, it still shows high radiation.

  3. 3

    This place has a lot of fish.

  4. 4

    Scientists don't think it's dangerous.

  5. 5

    But people are still a bit careful.

02

Surprising Zimtschnecken Ingredient Revealed

  • 겨울철 인기 있는 시나몬 롤에 특별한 재료가 더해져 더 부드럽고 맛있어진다고 해요.
  • 전통적인 이스트 반죽 대신 다른 재료가 들어간다고 합니다.
  • 맛이 더욱 촉촉하고 놀랍도록 맛있어졌다고 하네요.
cinnamon rollsfluffyspecial ingredient

Say it in your own words

  1. 1

    So, there's a new way to make cinnamon rolls.

  2. 2

    They add a special ingredient to make them super fluffy.

  3. 3

    This makes the rolls extra tasty and moist, especially in winter.

  4. 4

    It's something a lot of people really enjoy.

  5. 5

    Would you like to give it a try?

03

Potential Change to Health Insurance for Spouses

  • 독일 정부가 배우자에게 무료 건강보험을 제공하는 정책을 바꾸려고 할지도 몰라요.
  • 이것 때문에 건강보험비가 더 많이 들 수 있어요.
  • 정부가 클 수도 있는 변화들을 검토하고 있습니다.
health insurancespousespolicy change

Say it in your own words

  1. 1

    In Germany, there could be changes to health insurance policies.

  2. 2

    This might lead to higher costs for some people.

  3. 3

    The free insurance for spouses could end.

  4. 4

    Lots of people are understandably worried about what this means.

  5. 5

    The government is looking into making these changes soon.

Briefly
